description: The AvatarControllerSpawner component will spawn the corrosponding controller for the user when placed on an avatar under either the right or left hand.

fields.SpawnRoot: Where to spawn the model. (The Component attaches a slot called "root" under this when spawning the model, that becomes the model root)
fields.MaterialOverride: What material to replace the spawned model's materials with upon spawning.
fields.ControllerSpawned: The component calls this method when it has finished spawning the model with the user that has this controller model, and the root slot of the spawned model.
fields._sourceControllerInfo: The controller info this component grabbed in order to find and generate the right model.
fields._lastSpawned: The froox engine type of the last controller type this component generated.
